use_cases: Hero section titles with animated beams and sparkles effects
Landing page headers with hover-activated gradient animations
Feature highlight text with premium dark aesthetic
Brand statement headers with flowing beam animations
Marketing callouts with interactive hover reveals
ai_summary: Aceternity Cover is a visually striking hero component featuring animated horizontal beams, sparkles effects, and gradient animations that activate on hover. Built with Framer Motion, it creates premium dark-themed text covers ideal for landing pages and hero sections. The component supports nested children for custom text and includes smooth opacity and translate animations for a polished, modern aesthetic.
